description:
Goal
Lock in the ownership-boundary invariant by promoting the relevant clippy lints and updating agent docs where the subsystem model becomes simpler or more explicit.

Scope
- lint invocation / hook / CI surfaces used by this repo
- `.agent/docs/telemetry.md` and `.agent/docs/pipeline.md` if the final model changes
- only facts grounded in landed code

Contract
- the selected clone/conversion lints are part of the enforced workflow
- docs describe the current ownership model, not the migration story
- no stale exceptions remain after the structural cleanup lands

Validation
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings ...` with the chosen lints
- docs reviewed against landed code
- full `cargo test --workspace` before close
title: Ratchet ownership lints and restate the invariant docs
